description_long: This bungalow features a modern, low-profile design with a single-story layout and a prominent, gently sloped shed roof covered in dark, grid-patterned tiles. The exterior walls are clad in a combination of natural wood paneling and bold blue accent panels, creating a striking visual contrast. Large, floor-to-ceiling glass windows dominate the front facade, allowing ample natural light into the main living spaces. A single entry door is positioned to one side, framed by blue paneling, while the rear and side elevations are more subdued, with minimal window openings and a focus on privacy. The structure sits on a flat base, with no visible porch or veranda, emphasizing its clean, geometric lines. The overall appearance is contemporary, with an emphasis on simplicity, functionality, and integration with urban environments.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a sloped dark-tiled roof, wood and blue panel exterior, and large front-facing glass windows.
description_view_0: The front view showcases the main entrance, large glass windows, and a mix of wood and blue paneling.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a blue-framed door and mostly wood paneling, with minimal window openings.
description_view_2: The rear view is dominated by wood paneling and two small, dark-framed windows, lacking the blue accents and large glass seen in front.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the extended roof overhang and a continuous wood-paneled wall with no visible windows or doors.
